text: I am struck by the juxtaposition of containment and creativity here. In the first moment, through glass walls, I witness an environment focused on learning and seriousness, with people gathered, perhaps for a meeting or workshop—there is an undercurrent of purpose and resolve. The next moment, at the R+D display, inspiration takes center stage. I feel the contrast vividly: the enclosure of the meeting space yields to the expansive realm of research and imagination. It prompts me to ponder how boundaries—physical, intellectual—can be either barriers or catalysts for creativity. I feel curious, reflective, and quietly invigorated, as if on the verge of a small discovery.
